name: Respell
description: Respell — visual AI workflow builder. Drag-and-drop LLM chains with 100+ integrations for non-technical teams to ship AI automations.

seo.title: Respell — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Respell: Respell — visual AI workflow builder. Drag-and-drop LLM chains with 100+ integrations for non-technical teams to ship AI automations.

when_to_use: Visual LLM chain workflow built by a non-technical marketer
100-integration AI automation without writing Python code
Content generation pipeline triggered by CRM data events
Drag-and-drop AI workflow replacing a custom Python script
Ops team shipping AI automation without an ML engineer

pros: Visual canvas is genuinely non-technical friendly
Multi-step LLM chains with branching logic
Shareable spells work as internal tools
cons: Pricing scales quickly with token usage
Debugging long chains is still painful
Competes with n8n and Langflow open-source
review.verdict: Polished AI workflow builder for non-devs, though open-source alternatives now match features without the lock-in.
review.best_for: Ops and marketing teams shipping AI workflows without engineering support
review.not_for: Engineering teams who'd rather self-host n8n or LangGraph

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
